descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Kelowna Packers 7-0 in BCJHL championship series opener.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes dominated the Kelowna Packers 7-0 in the opening game of the B.C. Junior Hockey League championship series on March 17, 1987, at Richmond Arena. Goaltender Frank Romeo recorded a shutout, stopping 27 shots. Coach Orland Kurtenbach predicted a closer series ahead, while Packers coach Bill Hogaboam criticized his team's lack of intensity and effort.
